name: algoviz
description: Visual Algorithm Teacher — interactive algorithm visualizations

scripts.lint: npx eslint@8 --no-eslintrc --env browser,es2022 --global ScanAlgorithm,KnapsackAlgorithm,BubbleSortAlgorithm,BSTAlgorithm,MergeSortAlgorithm,BinarySearchAlgorithm --rule '{"no-undef": "error", "no-unused-vars": "warn"}' --ignore-pattern '*-algorithm.js' --ignore-pattern '*-algorithm.test.js' --ignore-pattern 'run-tests.js' bubble-sort.js elevator.js knapsack.js bfs.js script.js bst.js merge-sort.js binary-search.js
